mapper.select:
/* selectTmm01List */ SELECT CONCAT(TVH.COMPKEY, TVH.WAREKEY, TVH.VEHICKY) as ROWKEY /* TVH.* */ , TVH.COMPKEY , TVH.CARRIER , TVH.WAREKEY , TVH.VEHICKY
, MW.WHNAMKO , TVH.VHCFNAM , TVH.VHCSNAM , TVH.DLVTYPE , TVH.VHCOPTY , TVH.VHCTYPE , TRN.COMCDTX as vhctypename , TVH.VHCTNCD , TVH.MAXWEGT , TVH.MAXCAPA , TVH.SPERFYN , TVH.SPELFYN , TVH.SPECVYN , TVH.SPE04YN , TVH.SPE05YN , TVH.VEHGRNM , TVH.VEHCSNM , TVH.VEHTPYN , TVH.INBVHYN , TVH.OUBVHYN , TVH.GPSEQYN , TVH.GPSVHID , TVH.imei , TVH.msisdn , TVH.VHRCSTS , TVH.VHUSEYN , TVH.VHCMEMO , TVH.MDESTKY , TVH.OWNERNM , fn_com_todate(TVH.CREDATE) as CREDATE , fn_com_totime(TVH.CRETIME) as CRETIME , fn_sy_usernam(TVH.COMPKEY, TVH.CREUSER) as CREUSER , fn_com_todate(TVH.LMODATE) as LMODATE , fn_com_totime(TVH.LMOTIME) as LMOTIME , fn_sy_usernam(TVH.COMPKEY, TVH.LMOUSER) as LMOUSER
FROM TVHCMA TVH LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT MWA.WHNAMKO, MWA.COMPKEY, MWA.WAREKEY FROM MWARMA MWA ) MW ON MW.COMPKEY = TVH.COMPKEY AND MW.WAREKEY = TVH.WAREKEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( select MC.COMCDVL, MC.COMCDTX from V_MCODEM MC where MC.COMCDKY = 'VHCTYPE' and MC.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} ) TRN on TRN.COMCDVL = TVH.VHCTYPE
WHERE 1=1 AND TVH.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey}
AND TVH.WAREKEY = #{warekey}
AND carrier LIKE CONCAT('%', #{carrier}, '%')
AND VHCSNAM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vhcsnam}, '%')
AND TVH.VEHICKY LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vehicky}, '%')
AND VHCFNAM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vhcfnam}, '%')
AND VEHGRNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vehgrnm}, '%')
AND TVH.VHUSEYN = #{vhuseyn}
AND TVH.VEHICKY in (
SELECT TPV.VEHICKY FROM TPVASS TPV WHERE TPV.COMPKEY = TVH.COMPKEY AND TPV.WAREKEY = TVH.WAREKEY
AND TPV.USERACT in ( SELECT s.USERACT FROM V_SUSRMA s WHERE s.USERNAM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{usernam}, '%') ) )
AND TVH.VEHICKY in (
SELECT TPV.VEHICKY FROM TPVASS TPV WHERE TPV.USERACT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{useract}, '%') )

/* selectTpvassList */ SELECT CONCAT(TPV.COMPKEY, TPV.WAREKEY, TPV.USERACT) as ROWKEY , TPV.COMPKEY , TPV.VEHICKY , TPV.USERACT , TPV.WAREKEY , TPV.VAUMEMO , TPV.VHUSEYN , TPV.VHOWNYN
, USER.USERNAM
, USER.USERACT
, fn_com_todate(TPV.CREDATE) as CREDATE , fn_com_totime(TPV.CRETIME) as CRETIME , fn_sy_usernam(TPV.COMPKEY, TPV.CREUSER) as CREUSER , fn_com_todate(TPV.LMODATE) as LMODATE , fn_com_totime(TPV.LMOTIME) as LMOTIME , fn_sy_usernam(TPV.COMPKEY, TPV.LMOUSER) as LMOUSER
FROM TPVASS TPV , V_SUSRMA USER
WHERE 1=1 AND TPV.COMPKEY = USER.COMPKEY AND TPV.USERACT = USER.USERACT AND USER.USERTYP = 'DRIVER' AND TPV.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey}
AND vehicky LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vehicky}, '%')
AND warekey LIKE CONCAT('%', #{warekey}, '%')
mapper.insert:
/* insertTpvassList */ insert into TPVASS( COMPKEY , VEHICKY , USERACT , WAREKEY , VAUMEMO , VHUSEYN , VHOWNYN,
CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER )
values
( #{userData.compkey} , #{item.vehicky} , #{item.useract} , #{item.warekey} , #{item.vaumemo} , #{item.vhuseyn} , #{item.vhownyn} ,
to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now() , 'hh24miss') , #{userData.useract}, to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now() , 'hh24miss') , #{userData.useract} )
mapper.select:
/* selectTshrhdList */ SELECT CONCAT(SHT.COMPKEY, SHT.WAREKEY, SHT.SHTRTKY) as ROWKEY /* SHT.* */ , SHT.COMPKEY , SHT.WAREKEY , SHT.SHTRTKY
, SHT.DESTKEY
, SHT.INBSHYN , SHT.OUBSHYN
, SHT.SHTGRNM , SHT.SHTRTNM , SHT.shtcytm , SHT.shtmemo , SHT.tsuseyn
, IFNULL(JOINIT.itemnumb, 0) as itemnumb , IFNULL(JOINVE.vehiclenumb, 0) as vehiclenumb
, fn_com_todate(SHT.CREDATE) as CREDATE , fn_com_totime(SHT.CRETIME) as CRETIME , fn_sy_usernam(SHT.COMPKEY, SHT.CREUSER) as CREUSER , fn_com_todate(SHT.LMODATE) as LMODATE , fn_com_totime(SHT.LMOTIME) as LMOTIME , fn_sy_usernam(SHT.COMPKEY, SHT.LMOUSER) as LMOUSER
FROM TSHRHD SHT LEFT JOIN ( SELECT warekey,shtrtky,compkey, count(*) as itemnumb FROM TSHRIT SHIT GROUP BY CONCAT(warekey,shtrtky,compkey) ) JOINIT ON JOINIT.warekey = SHT.warekey AND JOINIT.shtrtky = SHT.shtrtky AND JOINIT.compkey = SHT.compkey
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT warekey,shtrtky,compkey, count(*) as vehiclenumb FROM TSHRVH SHVE GROUP BY CONCAT(warekey,shtrtky,compkey) ) JOINVE ON JOINVE.warekey = SHT.warekey AND JOINVE.shtrtky = SHT.shtrtky AND JOINVE.compkey= SHT.compkey
WHERE 1=1 AND SHT.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey}
AND SHT.warekey LIKE CONCAT('%', #{warekey}, '%')
AND SHT.shtgrnm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{shtgrnm}, '%')
AND SHT.shtrtnm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{shtrtnm}, '%')
AND SHT.tsuseyn = #{tsuseyn}
AND SHT.SHTRTKY IN ( SELECT IT.SHTRTKY FROM TSHRIT IT WHERE IT.DESTKEY = #{destkey} )
AND SHT.SHTRTKY IN ( SELECT IT.SHTRTKY FROM TSHRIT IT WHERE IT.DESTKEY IN ( SELECT DES.DESTKEY FROM MDESMA DES WHERE DES.DENAMLC LIKE CONCAT('%', #{denamlc}, '%') ) )
AND SHT.SHTRTKY IN ( SELECT IT2.SHTRTKY FROM TSHRVH IT2 WHERE IT2.VEHICKY IN (
SELECT VH.VEHICKY FROM TVHCMA VH WHERE VH.VHCSNAM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vhcsnam}, '%')
) )
AND SHT.SHTRTKY IN ( SELECT IT2.SHTRTKY FROM TSHRVH IT2 WHERE IT2.VEHICKY IN (
SELECT VH.VEHICKY FROM TVHCMA VH WHERE VH.VHUSEYN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vhuseyn}, '%')
) )
ORDER BY SHTGRNM, SHTRTNM, CREDATE
mapper.insert:
/* insertTshrhdList */ insert into TSHRHD( COMPKEY , WAREKEY, SHTRTKY, SHTGRNM , SHTRTNM, SHTCYTM, SHTMEMO , TSUSEYN, DESTKEY,
INBSHYN , OUBSHYN ,
CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER )
values
( #{item.userData.compkey} , #{item.warekey} , FN_TM_SHTRTKY() , #{item.shtgrnm} , #{item.shtrtnm} , #{item.shtcytm} , #{item.shtmemo} , #{item.tsuseyn} , #{item.destkey} ,
#{item.inbshyn} , #{item.oubshyn} ,
to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now() , 'hh24miss') , #{item.userData.useract}, to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now() , 'hh24miss') , #{item.userData.useract} )
mapper.select:
/* selectTshritList */ SELECT CONCAT(SHT.COMPKEY, SHT.WAREKEY, SHT.SHTRTKY, SHT.SHTRTIT) as ROWKEY /* SHT.* */ , SHT.COMPKEY , SHT.WAREKEY , SHT.SHTRTKY
, SHT.shtrtit , SHT.custkey , SHT.destkey , SHT.shtrpty
, fn_com_todate(SHT.CREDATE) as CREDATE , fn_com_totime(SHT.CRETIME) as CRETIME , fn_sy_usernam(SHT.COMPKEY, SHT.CREUSER) as CREUSER , fn_com_todate(SHT.LMODATE) as LMODATE , fn_com_totime(SHT.LMOTIME) as LMOTIME , fn_sy_usernam(SHT.COMPKEY, SHT.LMOUSER) as LMOUSER
FROM TSHRIT SHT WHERE 1=1 AND SHT.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey}
AND SHT.warekey LIKE CONCAT('%', #{warekey}, '%')
AND SHT.SHTRTKY LIKE CONCAT('%', #{shtrtky}, '%')
ORDER BY CASE WHEN SHT.SHTRTKY = 'START' THEN 1 WHEN SHT.SHTRTKY = 'ARRIVAL' THEN 2 WHEN SHT.SHTRTKY = 'END' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END
mapper.insert:
/* insertTshritList */ insert into TSHRIT( COMPKEY , WAREKEY, SHTRTKY, shtrtit , custkey, destkey, shtrpty,
CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER )
values
( #{item.userData.compkey} , #{item.warekey} , #{item.shtrtky} , FN_TM_SHTRTIT(#{item.userData.compkey},#{item.warekey},#{item.shtrtky}) , #{item.custkey} , #{item.destkey} , #{item.shtrpty},
to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now() , 'hh24miss') , #{item.userData.useract}, to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now() , 'hh24miss') , #{item.userData.useract} )
mapper.select:
/* selectTshrvhList */ SELECT CONCAT(COMPKEY, WAREKEY, SHTRTKY, VEHICKY) as ROWKEY /* VH.* */ , VH.COMPKEY , VH.WAREKEY , VH.SHTRTKY , VH.VEHICKY
, VH.srvehod , VH.shtvcap /* , VH.tsuseyn */
, fn_com_todate(VH.CREDATE) as CREDATE , fn_com_totime(VH.CRETIME) as CRETIME , fn_sy_usernam(VH.COMPKEY, VH.CREUSER) as CREUSER , fn_com_todate(VH.LMODATE) as LMODATE , fn_com_totime(VH.LMOTIME) as LMOTIME , fn_sy_usernam(VH.COMPKEY, VH.LMOUSER) as LMOUSER
FROM TSHRVH VH WHERE 1=1 AND VH.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey}
AND VH.warekey LIKE CONCAT('%', #{warekey}, '%')
AND VH.SHTRTKY LIKE CONCAT('%', #{shtrtky}, '%')
ORDER BY VH.srvehod
mapper.insert:
/* insertTshrvhList */ insert into TSHRVH( COMPKEY , WAREKEY, SHTRTKY, VEHICKY , srvehod, shtvcap,
CREDATE , CRETIME , CREUSER , LMODATE , LMOTIME , LMOUSER )
values
( #{item.userData.compkey} , #{item.warekey} , #{item.shtrtky} , #{item.vehicky} , #{item.srvehod} , #{item.shtvcap} ,
to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now() , 'hh24miss') , #{item.userData.useract}, to_char(now() , 'YYYYMMDD') , to_char(now() , 'hh24miss') , #{item.userData.useract} )
mapper.select: SELECT th.SHTRTKY as combovl , th.SHTRTNM as combonm , tv.VEHICKY, th.COMPKEY , th.WAREKEY FROM TSHRHD th /* TM Shuttle Routing(노선) */ INNER JOIN TSHRVH tv /* TM 셔틀노선 기본차량 */ ON tv.COMPKEY = th.COMPKEY AND tv.WAREKEY = th.WAREKEY AND tv.SHTRTKY = th.SHTRTKY
